# CloudCo — Deal Note — 2026-06-12

## Deal overview
AI-powered customer support automation. New logo. AE is Taylor Kim. Technical owner is Morgan Patel.

## Stage
SOW review — close date June 20, 2026.

## SOW status
Pending. Client legal sent initial redlines on June 9. Our AE has not yet responded to legal. **Blocker: AE needs to respond to legal redlines before close date or deal slips to Q3.**

## LOE status
LOE not yet signed. Estimated 10-week engagement starting mid-July. **Ask: LOE sign-off needed from client VP this week before the SOW can be finalized.**

## Staffing
Morgan Patel is confirmed as lead. We need one additional NLP engineer for weeks 3–10. Currently no one identified. There is a staffing gap.

## Requested roles
- Staff ML Engineer (Morgan Patel, confirmed)
- NLP Engineer (weeks 3–10, open — staffing gap)

## Risks
- SOW not signed before close date → deal slips to Q3
- LOE unsigned → scope and pricing not locked
- Staffing gap for NLP role could delay start

## Next action
I need to follow up with Taylor Kim on the legal redlines by June 14. Also need to reach out to resourcing team about the NLP engineer gap.
